name: Rogue Access Point Detected
description: Rogue access point is detected. This may indicate an adversary has deployed a malicious wireless access point to intercept network traffic or gain unauthorized access to the network.

prompts.prompt: A rogue access point named `{access_point_name}` with MAC address `{access_point_mac}` was detected at `{timestamp}`. Investigate the location of the access point and its connection to the network. Check for any unauthorized devices connected to it. Provide a summary of the investigation and recommend steps to physically remove the access point and secure the network.

parameters.name: access_point_name
parameters.description: The name (SSID) of the rogue access point.

parameters.name: access_point_mac
parameters.description: The MAC address of the rogue access point.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The time the rogue access point was detected.
